allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no user@192.168.1.163 "bash /home/user/camilladsp/scripts/status.sh && echo '---' && ss -tlnp | grep -E '5005|1234'")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "bash /root/camilladsp/scripts/status.sh && echo '---' && ss -tlnp | grep -E '5005|1234'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "kill \\$\(cat /root/camilladsp/pids/engine.pid 2>/dev/null\) 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; setsid /root/camilladsp/engine/camilladsp /root/camilladsp/config/camilladsp.yml -p 1234 -a 0.0.0.0 >> /root/camilladsp/logs/engine.log 2>&1 & echo \\$! > /root/camilladsp/pids/engine.pid; sleep 2; ss -tlnp | grep 1234")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "python3 -c 'import flask; print\(\\"flask ok\\"\)' 2>&1; python3 -c 'import websocket; print\(\\"websocket ok\\"\)' 2>&1; python3 -c 'import aiohttp; print\(\\"aiohttp ok\\"\)' 2>&1; python3 --version")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "pip3 install flask websocket-client 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "pip3 install flask websocket-client --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "bash /root/camilladsp/scripts/start_all.sh && sleep 3 && ss -tlnp | grep 1234")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "aplay -l 2>&1 | head -20; echo '---'; cat /root/camilladsp/scripts/start_all.sh | grep 'start_svc engine'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 'sed -i '\\''s|start_svc engine $ENGINE $CONFIG -p 1234|start_svc engine $ENGINE -p 1234 -a 0.0.0.0 -w|'\\'' /root/camilladsp/scripts/start_all.sh && grep '\\''start_svc engine'\\'' /root/camilladsp/scripts/start_all.sh')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "bash /root/camilladsp/scripts/stop_all.sh 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; bash /root/camilladsp/scripts/start_all.sh && sleep 3 && ss -tlnp | grep -E '1234|5005'")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "pip3 install pyyaml --break-system-packages -q && python3 -c 'import yaml; print\(\\"yaml ok\\"\)'")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "pkill -f 'python3.*server.py' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd /root/camilladsp/web && nohup python3 server.py > /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; ss -tlnp | grep ':80 '")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "cat /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log 2>/dev/null | head -30; echo '---'; ss -tlnp | grep ':80 '; echo '---ports'; ss -tlnp | grep ':808'")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "ss -tlnp | grep ':80'; cat /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; python3 /root/camilladsp/web/server.py 2>&1 &")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "pkill -f 'python3.*server.py' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd /root/camilladsp/web && nohup python3 server.py > /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; cat /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "bash -c 'cd /root/camilladsp/web && python3 server.py > /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log 2>&1 & disown; sleep 3; cat /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log'")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "ss -tlnp | grep ':5000 ' && echo 'ACTIVO' || echo 'NO ACTIVO'; cat /root/camilladsp/logs/web.log 2>/dev/null | head -20")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@192.168.1.127 "curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5000/ | head -5; echo '---'; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/config | python3 -c 'import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(\\"ok:\\",r.get\(\\"ok\\"\)\); cfg=r.get\(\\"config\\",{}\); print\(\\"devices:\\",list\(cfg.get\(\\"devices\\",{}\).keys\(\)\)[:4]\)'")
